name: generative-ui-browser
description: generative-ui-browser — search-style prompts, full-frame images, sketch to explore (monorepo; app in generative-ui-browser/).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
